prerequisites.value: Int 13, Amateur Investigator, Studied Combatant, base attack bonus +8, 1 rank in at least one Knowledge skill, no levels in a class that has the inspiration class feature.

description.value: **Benefit:** Your bonuses for Studied Combatant increase to a +4 insight bonus on melee attack rolls and a +4 bonus on damage rolls. This feat otherwise works like the Studied Combatant feat.
